meaning: 富士山[日本本州岛中南部]
examples: The snow peaked Fujiyama is the trademark of Japan.
It lies to the southwest of Fujiyama, and the forest there is beautiful.
Withstand all the trials Fujiyama encounters and become the best ninja in all of Japan!
"This is Fujiyama Crest, " Dettori says, holding a feed bucket to the nose of an aging gelding.
Cosmo Fujiyama, 23, lives in Honduras full time to coordinate the group's building efforts on the ground.
